content.en:
After comprehending the rules of the Origin on the other side, Ye Tian continued to comprehend here.

After all, there are still dozens of primeval eras, and we can't waste it!

Therefore, continuing to comprehend the origin of the land on the other side of eternity can also increase the realm of the rules of the origin on the other side.

However, it is too difficult to improve the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side!

Maybe after a long period of penance, the realm will be improved a little bit.

But when the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side increases, the strength will become stronger and stronger.

Before you know it, dozens of primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

The Tailing Origin Array finally couldn't hold it anymore.

Rumble!!!!

Tailing's Origin Array shattered, and the Origin of the Land on the Eternal Shore could not be seen, and the surrounding scene returned to its original state.

Ye Tian stood here, unable to continue to comprehend the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, so he ended his cultivation.

Then.

He sensed that one by one, the deputy mountain lord and the mountain lord had come to his residence.

Thereupon.

He came out right away.

"I've seen the Mountain Lord and the Deputy Mountain Lord!"

Ye Tian said politely.

Then.

The Lord of Gu Heng said curiously, "Lord of Endless, did you build the Tailing Origin Array this time?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, they all saw it, and they couldn't hide it.

The Lord of Gu Heng said again: "It takes three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold to build the Tailing Origin Array, where did you get so much high-grade eternal ancient gold?"

He thought that Ye Tian would hide it and didn't want to reveal it.

However, Ye Tian directly revealed, "I have obtained so much high-grade eternal ancient gold from the ruins on the other side!"

"How could it be !!!"

The Lord of Gu Heng didn't believe it for the first time.

He also had an understanding of the ruins on the other side, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm couldn't enter it, and it was too dangerous for the Bone Transformation Realm to enter there, and it was easy to die.

If you want to find more than 3,000 pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold in the ruins on the other side, how many geniuses on the other side of the bank will have to lose to do it!

"Mountain Lord, I did find so many high-grade eternal ancient gold in the ruins on the other side, if the Mountain Lord doesn't believe it, I can't help it!"

Ye Tian said.

"Maybe it's the Endless Lord's luck!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero.

The Lord of Gu Heng didn't ask anything more, after all, Ye Tian had already given the answer.

It's just that this answer doesn't satisfy him.

Soon after, the Lord of Gu Heng and the others left, and they didn't ask too much about it.

And Ye Tian didn't reveal the matter of the Origin Rules on the other side, otherwise the attitude of the Lord of Gu Heng would definitely not be like this, and he would even treat it as an equal.

......

The years that followed.

Ye Tian used the source stone of the other side to cultivate, constantly refining his golden bones on the other side, and letting his immeasurable golden bones complete nine bone transformations.

And this process is very difficult, the difficulty of the other side level genius to change from the eighth bone transformation realm to the ninth bone transformation realm requires the consumption of a large number of other shore source stones.

Many of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm's other shore-level geniuses also spent endless years collecting pieces of Otherside Source Stones to finally break through the realm.

For example, the Lord of the Ancient Void, the other party is the son of the Lord of Gu Heng, with the help of the Lord of Gu Heng, for such a long time, he is still only eight bone transformation realms, and he has not yet become a nine-time bone transformation realm.

From this, it can be seen that if you want to become a genius of the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm, you need to spend how many Source Stones from the other side.

For example, this time, if all the source stones that Gu Heng Shan obtained in that eighth-level personality world were given to him, there might be hope that he would break through to the ninth bone transformation realm, but Gu Heng Shan would not do this.

After all, Gu Heng Mountain has two other side level geniuses, plus Gu Heng Mountain also has to store some other side source stones!

No, after some years, the source stones on Ye Tian's body will not be enough!

"Although Gu Heng Mountain still has some source stones on the other side, but my contribution value is not enough, I can also use the high-grade eternal ancient gold to exchange, but Gu Heng Mountain does not have too many source stones on the other side, if I use the high-grade eternal ancient gold to exchange those source stones on the other side, resulting in Gu Heng Mountain without the source stones on the other side. That Lord of the Ancient Void is estimated to be unhappy, and it will also make the Lord of Gu Heng unhappy. "

Therefore, he still decided to go to the Eternal Night Pavilion to exchange for the source stone on the other side.

The wealth of the Eternal Night Pavilion is amazing, far from being comparable to the ancient Heng Mountain, and there will definitely be a surplus source stone on the other side.

Exchange the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold for the Source Stone of the other side, and the Eternal Night Pavilion will definitely be happy.

After all, the source stone on the other side is easy to obtain, but the high-grade eternal ancient gold is very difficult to obtain!

"This time, let's let the Lord of the Winter Yuan copy the body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

this day.

Eternal Night Pavilion Branch.

Ye Tian's Winter Yuan Lord copied his body and came here again, and the Lord of Yuan Ji personally came out to receive him.

"Lord of Dong Yuan, what materials are you going to buy this time?"

The Lord of the Yuan Pole asked.

"Yes, I want to buy some source stones from the other side, how many do you have in the Eternal Night Pavilion?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Lord of the Yuan Pole showed a look of embarrassment.

"Lord of the Winter Yuan, if it was before, our Eternal Night Pavilion really had a lot of Source Stones from the other side, but now there really aren't many!" the Lord of the Yuan Pole revealed.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Lord of the Yuan Pole explained: "It should be that your master Jun Ancestor has not received the news yet, in fact, a small number of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors have received a little bit of news more or less, but the news has been suppressed at present, and if you don't take the initiative to find out, it is naturally not clear." Wind Tooth Island, the land of the Eternal Shore, has to recruit a group of members, and it is limited to only other level geniuses. Therefore, not only our Eternal Night Pavilion, but also some other forces have all bought the source stones from the other side, and there are almost no trace of the source stones from the other side!"

"What is Wind Tooth Island?"

Ye Tian asked.

Seeing that Ye Tian hadn't heard of it, the Lord of Yuan Ji introduced: "You should know that our seventy-two regions all belong to the east, and the land of the Eternal Shore is divided into five major territories: east, west, south, north and center, among which the central part is the most terrifying, and the eastern part is undoubtedly an ant in the eyes of the central one. And the reason why it is divided into five territories is because the eastern part is separated by the Origin Black River from the other four territories, and the Origin Black River is very dangerous, even if it is the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, there is a high possibility of falling. And Wind Tooth Island is a special treasure land located in the east and middle, and it is also a powerful force, stronger than the Chaos Domain, and there is even a Origin Realm in it that is more powerful than the Lord of Chaos Realm. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

With the continuous introduction of the Lord of Yuanji, he became more and more familiar with Fengya Island.

In short, once you join Fengya Island, not only will you have a bright future, but you will also have the hope of going to the central part of the country.

Of course.

Those primeval-level geniuses or ordinary bone transformation realms naturally didn't want to go to Wind Tooth Island, nor did they want to go to the central part of the country.

However, some other shore-level geniuses want to go one step further and naturally want to join Wind Tooth Island.
